creator: jjreynold@home.com
text:
The included SHAR archive is a new port--s10sh. It's a userland driver
originally written for Linux which communicates to Canon S10/S20 and S100
cameras over RS-232 or USB. USB support is achieved from the recent "libusb"
port.

portlint(1) has been run successfully.

Much thanks to Mikhail Teterin <mi@aldan.algebra.com> for hints at creating a
"smoother" port!

How-To-Repeat: 
  N/A
